mapper.update:
UPDATE audit_records SET manual_audit_result = #{manualAuditResult}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, audit_time = NOW(), reject_reason = #{rejectReason} WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_records (content_id, content_type, source_type, content, submitter_id, auto_audit_result, manual_audit_result, created_at) VALUES (#{contentId}, #{contentType}, #{sourceType}, #{content}, #{submitterId}, #{autoAuditResult}, #{manualAuditResult}, NOW())
